name: wiff
description: Run deterministic, resumable JavaScript workflows across Codex, Claude, and Cursor agents.

interface.longDescription: Write ordinary JavaScript that runs Codex, Claude, or Cursor agents in parallel or as pipelines, persists results, and resumes without repeating successful work.
defaultPrompt: Turn this task into a resumable multi-agent workflow
Run independent reviewers in parallel and synthesize their findings
Resume the last failed workflow without repeating successful agents
